compounds.frequency: every other day or every third day

benefits.description: 100-150mcg DSIP knocks them out; better results than 300mcg
CJC/IPA has helped somewhat with staying asleep

protocol_notes: Tried 300mcg DSIP with little effect; found 100-150mcg more effective. Doses every other day or every third day. Also takes D3/K2, magnesium glycinate, melatonin, glycine, lion's mane, chaga, and ashwagandha. Falling asleep is easy but staying asleep is difficult. Best remedy when waking at 3am is reading an ebook on phone.
